name: Vegetarian Mince Pies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all mincemeat ingredients together by hand or in a food processor for a smoother texture.
2. Rub shortening into the flour until the mixture resembles fine breadcrumbs. Add enough flour to enable the pastry to hold together.
3. Roll out the pastry and cut into 12 cm circles. Press circles into the bottom of lightly oiled baking tins.
4. Fill with mincemeat and cover with another pastry circle.
5. Press down at the edges and make a small steam hole in the top.
6. Bake for 10 minutes at 400°F (200°C Gas 6). Pies can be frozen before baking either in the tin or remove from the tin once they are solid.
7. Mincemeat will keep for 1 week covered in the fridge. Makes 36 pies.
